title: AtomatrixCore
description: A core plugin that runs in Atomatrix Minecraft Server Setups to provide multiple features
body:
# AtomatrixCore
This is a core plugin used for Atomatrix Server Setups. Installing this plugin on a server not created by Atomatrix will not work/provide no function.

This plugin comes with all server setups by default, but if you'd like to update it or if you've deleted it, you can also download it here.

## Provided Functionality:
- Auto-Updating ViaVersion
- Create logs with **/createlogs** that upload to [mclo.gs](https://mclo.gs/)
- Easy editable Lunar Client Server Rich Presence
- Customizable Server Links (_ESC > Server Links_ Menu)
- Customizable Branding Placeholders
